Projects.title: Multi-Agent Behaviour Detection System
desc: Architected an advanced AI-driven security system utilizing Vision-Language Models (VLM), AI Agents, and YOLOv8 for real-time computer vision and human behavior detection, achieving high tracking accuracy.
Integrated RFID technology (RC522 and UHF readers) with ESP32 microcontrollers to synchronize physical tracking with intelligent visual data processing with near-zero latency.

Projects.title: Project 2030: MyAI Future Hackathon
desc: Engineered Sentin AI, a zero-touch, autonomous multi-agent monitoring system designed for elderly care alongside Team Cognix (Google Developer Groups UTM).
Integrated Google APIs and utilized computer vision to instantly detect emergency situations (e.g., falls) and simulate real-time caregiver alerts, reducing manual response dependencies by 100%.

Projects.title: Intelligent Trading Analyst (JomHack Finalist)
desc: Developed an intelligent Trading Analyst solution designed to analyze market data and provide actionable, data-driven trading insights for Challenge 2 as Team 058.
Successfully qualified for the final stage out of a highly competitive pool of hundreds of participants nationwide. Demonstrated elite project management and technical problem-solving skills.

Projects.title: Smart Predictive Maintenance System
desc: Developed a predictive maintenance model powered by Deep Learning and IoT simulations to monitor industrial machine parameters (temperature, vibration) for Varsity Hackathon USM.
Designed an intelligent classification system to output health scores and intelligent maintenance recommendations for SMEs, aimed at reducing machine downtime.

Projects.title: MindLock AI-Powered Password Generator
desc: Developed an intelligent authentication system integrating AI-assisted password generation utilizing rule-based intelligence and leetspeak transformation.
Implemented biometric face verification and a visual memory system, improving secure, human-centered login processes. Built a conversational AI chatbot module to provide user guidance.

Projects.title: PALAPES UTeM System Fitness
desc: Developed a comprehensive fitness measurement and scalable database management system for the Reserve Officers Training Unit (PALAPES).
Engineered performance data processing algorithms to track and manage cadet physical assessments (e.g., 2.4 km runs, push-ups) for over 100+ military personnel.

Projects.title: Autonomous Object & Face Detection System
desc: Implemented Deep Learning-based detection models for Robocon Malaysia 2025.
Utilized Python and OpenCV to detect and track human faces and basketball nets in real-time, significantly enhancing autonomous robot targeting precision.
